channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran and Israel express reservations about deal ahead of expected signing
item.description: Senior U.S. officials report that President Trump and Iran's top negotiator have already signed a memorandum of understanding remotely, ahead of an expected signing ceremony.

item.title: Gavin Newsom says Department of Justice is investigating him and his wife
item.description: Newsom alleged that Trump is targeting him due to his potential presidential candidacy.

item.title: Knicks achieve best point differential in NBA playoff history during championship run
item.description: The New York Knicks set a record for the highest point differential in playoff history during their 2026 NBA Championship run. Mike Vorkunov, n...

item.title: Air Force B-52 bomber crashes after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base
item.description: An Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber crashed shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base in California on Monday, according to the base.
